description: Legal document involving several amīrs, including ʿIzz al-Mulk Bahāʾ al-Dawla wa-Sadīduhā Dhū al-[...]. Also concerning Jaʿfar b. ʿAlī, the ʿArīf ʿAbdallāh b. Muḥammmad, and another ʿArīf, and attendance at 'the majlis al-khidma.' Dated: Ṣafar 513 or 523 AH = 1119 or 1129 CE. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
